en: A: Who is he?

ab: aama ku kanintaw maw na maralrak kani malri.
en: He is my uncle.

ab: i temama nantu petris ni taina na ma’inay kiyakarun za eman?
ch: A:你的舅舅從事什麼工作?
en: A: What does your uncle do for a living?
B: He’s a cop.
A: Who is that guy?

ab: intaw mu maw i valri na vavayan.
en: B: She’s my sister.

ab: ulra tu kiyakarunan i vau na vavayan?
en: A: Does your sister have a job?
B: She works in a hospital.

ch: A:他們兩個人是兄弟姐妹嗎?
en: A: Are they brothers and sisters?
B: No, they are friends.
No,they are friends.
A: Are you Aboriginal?
B: Yes, I’m from the Puyuma tribe.

ab: i turuma’anu mu maw na yēncumin?
en: A: Is your spouse Aboriginal?

ab: ai, maw mu a Bunun i intaw.
en: B: Yes, but he is a Bunun.
A: Is your father very tall?
B: Yes, we are all very tall.

ab: temakakesi lra i wadiu na vavayan?
en: A: Does your sister go to school?
B: Yes, she went to school.

ab: sayhu marengay za ta piningaiyan na wadiyu?
en: A: Do your siblings speak the language?

ab: ai, sayhu marengay za ta piningaiyan.
en: B: Yes, they speak the ethnic language.
A: How many brothers and sisters do you have?
B: I have three brothers and sisters.

ab: salrangan u kazu kana temama za i taina?
ch: A:你和爸爸媽媽一起住嗎?
en: A: Do you live with your parents?

ab: ai, salrangan ku kazu kana malri za i nani.
ch: B:是，我和爸爸媽媽一起住。
en: B: Yes, I live with my mom and dad.

ch: A:你和爺爺奶奶一起住嗎?
en: A: Do you live with your grandparents?

ch: B:不，我沒和跟他們一起住。
en: B: No, I didn’t live with them.

ab: salrangan u za i eman kazu?
en: A: Who do you live with?

ab: salrangan ku kani malri za i nani zi i valri na ma’inay kazu.
ch: B:我跟爸爸、媽媽、哥哥住在一起。
en: B: I live with my father, mother and brother.
A: Where are you from?
B: I’m from Hualien.
A: Where is your home?
B: Our home is in Taitung.

ab: kazu i iyan namu zekalr aziyu ziya?
en: A:Where is your hometown?
B: My hometown is in Hualien.
A: Where is your tribe?
B: Our tribe is in Chippen.

ab: nu aidan mu muruma’ u i zekalr?
ch: A:你什麼時候會回去部落?
en: A: When are you going back to the tribe?

ab: nu katalaulepan nu derun mu ka’azi ku muruma’.
en: B: I will go back in the summer.

ab: inku mu maw ku na Pinuyumayan na alrak.
en: I’m a Puyuma kid.
